buyers.name: Diamond Banc (Nashville — Green Hills)
buyers.address: 3805 Green Hills Village Dr, Nashville, TN 37215
buyers.payout_claims: "we consistently offer industry-leading payouts" and "top dollar" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: "Your gold is weighed and tested right in front of you. We use professional, calibrated equipment and explain each step of the process."
buyers.evidence_notes: National jewelry-equity lender/buyer with a dedicated Nashville office; BBB A+ accredited; GIA affiliation; Jewelers Mutual Insurance Company and Brinks logos displayed. Market director is a GIA AJP. Buys gold and silver jewelry, coins, bullion; also offers jewelry-collateral loans.

buyers.name: Nashville Gold & Coin
buyers.hours: By appointment only; same-day appointments available
buyers.payout_claims: "competitive pricing" and "top dollar"; a testimonial cites payment "based on that hours current price" — no rate schedule posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: In Middle Tennessee since 2016; BBB Accredited Business, Certified Coin Exchange member, NGC and PCGS authorized dealer. One-on-one appointment model: "no pressure, no gimmicks." Buys gold, silver, rare coins and collections.

buyers.name: King Jewelers
buyers.hours: Gold buying Tue–Sat during store hours (times not posted on page)
buyers.payout_claims: "We pay the most for your gold & diamonds"; "ability to repurpose the gold ourselves which means higher payouts"; references "live prices" on pure gold — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: "Accredited appraisers examine your gold or diamonds while you wait"; graduate gemologists evaluate — equipment/method not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Family jeweler established 1912 (100+ years); GIA and Jewelers of America credentials cited; "No appointment necessary," examination done while you wait. Claims a Miami Herald "highest gold buyer" mention (legacy Florida roots).
